3.q: PwHAP5 plays a role in pollen tube growth orientation by interaction with PwFKBP12 in Picea wilsonii Mast.

4.q: PwRFCP1 (Resemble-FCA-contain-PAT1 domain), an interaction protein of PwNAC2 was screened via yeast two hybrid. Luciferase complementation assay confirmed the interaction in vivo and bimolecular fluorescence complementation assay showed the interaction in nucleus.

5.q: ABA or CBF-pathway marker genes were substantially higher in PwNAC2 transgenic Arabidopsis.
